goal: Phase 3 simulates a fresh executor starting Phase 1 with only the plan in hand and flags any ambiguity that blocks cold-start execution.
assertions: controlflow-verify SKILL.md Phase 3 requires Phase 1 to execute without asking the user a question.
Verification commands must be concrete enough to run as-is (no guessing).
Each destructive or migration-heavy phase must have rollback/recovery guidance.
Inter-phase contract deliverable format must be explicit and downstream validation stated.
